description_for_human: Search flights by describing your trip in plain text. Get prices, safety ratings, and direct booking links.
description_for_model: Search for flights using natural language queries. The user describes their trip (origin, destination, dates, budget, preferences) in plain text and the API returns real-time flight results with prices, durations, airline info, safety ratings based on conflict zone analysis, and direct booking links. Also provides data on active conflict zones affecting aviation. Supported origins: Berlin (BER), Frankfurt (FRA), Munich (MUC), Hamburg (HAM), Dusseldorf (DUS). Prices default to EUR. The search endpoint returns results as a Server-Sent Events stream.
